summary: Runner observability foundation satisfies approved scope after review-thread fixes at 8bcc414b9b70: new status/inspect/logs commands are implemented, documented, and verified, including compressed stderr and prepared follow behavior.
findings: Resolved review blocker: stderr logs now use trace artifact reader semantics and can read retained gzip artifacts.
Resolved review blocker: task run logs --follow exits cleanly for prepared runs instead of waiting forever.
Coordination and lifecycle authority prompts remain covered for independent Codex runners.
evidence_refs: GitHub PR #4174 review comments r3313238109 and r3313238117 addressed in 8bcc414b9b70
residual_risks: Hosted checks must rerun on the updated PR head before integration.
